description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat, overhanging roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large glass windows, vertical columns, and decorative planters with red flowers. The side of the house reveals a spacious wooden deck and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by white walls and glass railings. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a large patio area, seamlessly connecting indoor and outdoor living spaces. The structure is primarily constructed from white concrete or stucco, with accents of dark gray and wood, and includes both open and enclosed spaces. The landscaping includes a grassy lawn and a raised earth foundation, giving the house a slightly elevated appearance.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, a wooden deck, and a swimming pool, featuring clean lines and white concrete construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, vertical columns, and decorative planters with red flowers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, swimming pool, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces with glass railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, pool, and the integration of indoor and outdoor living areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, glass balcony, and grassy lawn area adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
